def negative_core_model_reads_process_environment():
    rule_id = "core_model_reads_process_environment"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag core classes or pure helper layers that directly access os.environ, os.getenv, or global settings."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
